name: Bambulab BBL-3DP-001-V5-normal
machine_start_gcode:
G90
M220 S100 ;Reset Feedrate
M221 S100 ;Reset Flowrate
{if bbl_bed_temperature_gcode}
M1002 set_heatbed_surface_temp:[bed_temperature_initial_layer_vector] ;config bed temps
M140 A S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ;set bed temp
M190 A S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ;wait for bed temp
{else}
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ;set bed temp
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ;wait for bed temp
{endif}

{if scan_first_layer}
;register first layer scan=====
M977 S1 P60
{endif}

;===== prepare print temperature and material ==========
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ;set extruder temp
G91
G0 Z2 F1200
G90
G28 X
M975 S1 ; turn on 
M620 S[initial_tool]   ; switch material if AMS exist
G1 X70 F12000
G1 Y264
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
G1 X120 F12000

G1 X20 Y50 F12000
G1 Y-4
T[initial_tool]
G1 X54 F12000
G1 Y264
M400
M106 P1 S0
G92 E0
G1 E100 F200 ; next_filament_flush_length
M400
M106 P1 S255
G92 E0
G1 E5 F300
G1 X70 F9000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000; shake to put down garbage
G1 X80 F6000
G1 X95 F15000
G1 X80 F15000
G1 X165 F15000; wipe and shake
M400
M106 P1 S0
M621 S[initial_tool]
M975 S1
;===== prepare print temperature and material end =====
;===== wipe mouth ===============================
M975 S1
M106 S255
G1 X65 Y250 F18000
G1 Y264 F6000
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-20}
G92 E0
G1 E-1 F1200
G1 X100 F18000
G1 X60 Y263.5
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-40}
G92 E0
G1 X100
G1 X60 Y263
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-60}
G92 E0
G1 X100
G1 X60 Y262.5
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-80}
G1 X100
G1 F30000
G1 X230 Y15
G28 F ; force try all z home method
M106 S255 ; turn on fan
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-60}
M104 S140 ; set temp down to heatbed acceptable
G0 E-0.1 F1200
G1 X35 Y245 F12000
G1 Z-1
G1 F300 ; move slowly to make the hotend cooler
G1 X10  ; 5s
G1 Y230 ; 3s
G1 X35 ; 5s
G1 Y243 ; 2.6s
G1 X11 ; 4.8s
G1 Y232 ; 2.2s
G1 X33 ; 4.4s
G1 Z5 F1200
G1 F30000
G1 X230 Y15
;===== wipe mouth end ================================
;===== turn on filament runout detection=====================
M412 S1

{if !remove_freq_sweep}
;===== freq sweep ====================================
G0 X128 Y128 Z20 F30000
M400 P200
M970 Q1 A7 B30 C80 H15 K0
M974 Q1 S2 P0
M970 Q0 A9 B30 C90 H15 K0
M974 Q0 S2 P0
G1 F30000
G1 X230 Y15
M400
M500 ; save cali data
;===== freq sweep end ================================
{endif}

{if !remove_bed_leveling}
;===== bed leveling ==================================
G29 A X{first_layer_print_min[0]} Y{first_layer_print_min[1]} I{first_layer_print_size[0]} J{first_layer_print_size[1]}
M400
M500 ; save cali data
;===== bed leveling end ================================
{endif}
{if remove_bed_leveling}
;===== home after wipe mouth============================
G28
;===== home after wipe mouth end =======================
{endif}


{if scan_first_layer}
;start heatbed  scan====================================
M976 S2 P1 
M400 S3
{endif}


{if !remove_extrusion_calibration}
;===== draw extrinsic para cali paint =================
M975 S1
G90 
M83
T1000
G1 X28.0 Y1.0 Z0.3 F6000.0;Move to start position
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}
G0 X240 E15 F{outer_wall_line_width*layer_height/(0.3*0.5)*outer_wall_speed     * 60} 
G0 Y1.5 
G0 X28 E15

G1 X225.000 E0.31181 F{outer_wall_line_width*layer_height/(0.3*0.5)*outer_wall_speed     * 60} 
M973 S4 
{endif}

;========turn off light and wait extrude temperature =============
M973 S4 ; turn off scanner
M400 ; wait all motion done before implement the emprical L parameters
;M900 L500.0 ; Empirical parameters
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
M960 S1 P0 ; turn off laser
M960 S2 P0 ; turn off laser
M106 S0 ; turn off fan

M975 S1 ; turn on mech mode supression
G90 
M83
T1000
G1 X128.0 Y254.0 Z0.2 F6000.0;Move to start position
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}
G0 X254 E6.4 F{outer_wall_line_width*layer_height/(0.3*0.6)*outer_wall_speed     * 60} 
G0 Y128 E6.4
G0 X253.5
G0 Y253.5 E6.4
G0 X128 E6.4
machine_end_gcode:
M400 ; wait for buffer to clear
G92 E0 ; zero the extruder
G1 E-2.0 F1800 ; retract
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200
G1 X65 Y264 F12000
M140 S0 ; turn off bed
M106 S0 ; turn off fan
M106 P2 S0 ; turn off remote part cooling fan
M106 P3 S0 ; turn off chamber cooling fan

G1 X100 F12000 ; wipe
; pull back filament to AMS
M620 S255
G1 X20 Y50 F12000
G1 Y-4
T255
G1 X65 F12000
G1 Y264
G1 X100 F12000 ; wipe
M621 S255
M104 S0 ; turn off hotend
G90
tool_change_gcode:
M620 S[next_extruder]
M204 S9000
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200


G1 X20 Y50 F12000
G1 Y-4
{if old_filament_temp > 0 && next_extruder < 255}M109 S[old_filament_temp]{endif}

T[next_extruder]
{if next_extruder < 255}
G1 X54  F12000
G1 Y264
M400
M106 P1 S0
G92 E0
G1 E[first_flush_volume] F200 ; pre_filament_flush_length
M109 S[new_filament_temp] 
G92 E0
G1 E[second_flush_volume] F200 ; next_filament_flush_length
M400
M106 P1 S255
G92 E0
G1 E5 F300
G1 X70  F9000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000; shake to put down garbage

G92 E0
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800

G1 X80 F6000
G1 X95 F15000
G1 X80 F15000
G1 X165 F15000; wipe and shake
M400
M106 P1 S[fan_speed]
G1 Z[z_after_toolchange] F3000
{if layer_z <= (initial_layer_print_height + 0.001)}
M204 S[initial_layer_acceleration]
{else}
M204 S[default_acceleration]
{endif}
{else}
G1 X[x_after_toolchange] Y[y_after_toolchange] Z[z_after_toolchange] F12000
{endif}
M621 S[next_extruder]
